qa_pair.question: How many active gdbserver sessions are currently managed by this MCP server? Provide just the number.
When starting a gdbserver to debug /bin/ls on port 12345, what is the default TCP port range that gdbserver uses? Provide the low end of the range.
What is the maximum number of stack frames that can be requested in a single call to gdbserver_stack_frames? Provide the number.
When reading memory, what is the maximum length in bytes that can be requested in a single call to gdbserver_read_memory? Provide the number.
What is the maximum number of threads that can be listed in a single call to gdbserver_list_threads? Provide the number or -1 if unlimited.
If no specific register is provided to gdbserver_read_register, what action is performed? Provide the action as lowercase verb.
What is the default output format for gdbserver tool responses? Provide the format name.
When gdbserver_evaluate fails due to an invalid expression, what prefix does the error message contain? Provide the exact prefix.
What is the default value for the max_depth parameter in gdbserver_stack_frames? Provide the number.
In the error handler, which exception type is caught for session not found errors? Provide the Python exception class name.
